TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pakeriran, title = Pakeriran, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pakeriran} }

S.FORM: O Pakeriran (Holam: Ś∑īŚÖčŚäõŤóćÁöĄŚ§ŹŚ§©) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2017 a miheca. Mianingaya a patingso^ Matam Hidaw
S.PHON: o~u pak…ôriran (ńßo~u…ĺam: *******) ¶a ¶…ôj kamo~uko~u °aj a ti…ĺifi …ô*a i tajwan. misaŇča ° pipańßo~uso~uan to~u ti…ĺifi no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-min ¶i ina to~u ti…ĺifi …ô*a. mipasa…¨~…ģak to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶a. mianiŇčaja a patiŇčso~u Ē matam ńßi…¨~…ģaw
